title: stemonoporus kanneliyensis
intro: Stemonoporus kanneliyensis, a species of plant in the family Stemonuraceae, is a rare and endangered tree native to Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. Its health benefits include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as a tonic to boost immunity. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are administered orally or topically to harness its medicinal properties.
